scores.name: hardship_handling
scores.reason: The agent acknowledged the borrower’s refusal and stopped pushing options, but it did not meaningfully detect or address hardship beyond repeating policy constraints. There was no empathetic de-escalation or safe hardship-specific handling.

scores.name: continuity
scores.reason: The conversation remained on the same topic, but the agent repeated nearly identical policy statements multiple times, making the interaction feel redundant rather than smoothly continuous across stages.

scores.name: resolution_quality
scores.reason: The agent did not move toward an appropriate resolution after repeated refusal; it mainly reiterated unavailable options and recorded no agreement. This avoided constraint violations, but it did not advance the conversation toward a constructive endpoint.
